mapper.select: SELECT l.log_id, l.policy_id, l.operator_id, u.name AS operator_name, l.action, l.remark, l.created_date FROM approval_log l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.operator_id = u.id WHERE l.policy_id = #{policyId} ORDER BY l.created_date DESC

SELECT policy_id, policy_number, status, created_date FROM policies
AND ( (status = 'DRAFT' AND agent_id IS NULL) OR (status = 'REJECTED' AND agent_id = #{userId}) )
AND status = 'SIGNING'
ORDER BY created_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE policies SET status = #{nextStatus}, agent_id = #{userId}, reviewer_id = #{userId}, last_reviewed_date = NOW() WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND ( (status = 'DRAFT' AND agent_id IS NULL) OR (status = 'REJECTED' AND agent_id = #{userId}))
UPDATE policies SET status = #{nextStatus}, reviewer_id = #{userId}, last_reviewed_date = NOW() WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND status = 'SIGNING'
mapper.select: SELECT p.policy_id, p.policy_number, p.applicant_id, p.insured_name, p.insured_id_number, p.insured_birth_date, p.insured_gender, p.insured_occupation_code, p.departure_date, p.return_date, p.insured_days, p.coverage_id, p.base_premium, p.final_premium, p.status, p.agent_id, p.reviewer_id, p.last_reviewed_date, p.created_date, u_agent.name AS agent_name, u_reviewer.name AS reviewer_name, u_applicant.name AS applicant_name FROM policies p LEFT JOIN users u_agent ON p.agent_id = u_agent.id LEFT JOIN users u_reviewer ON p.reviewer_id = u_reviewer.id LEFT JOIN users u_applicant ON p.applicant_id = u_applicant.id WHERE p.policy_id = #{policyId}
SELECT u.email FROM users u JOIN policies p ON u.id = p.applicant_id WHERE p.policy_id = #{policyId}
SELECT u.email FROM users u JOIN policies p ON u.id = p.agent_id WHERE p.policy_id = #{policyId}
SELECT policy_number FROM policies WHERE policy_id = #{policyId}
